items.front: 8-5-1: QNE vs QNH in offshore/oceanic transition
items.back: QNE = standard altimeter setting (29.92). QNH = local altimeter setting. Below FL180, control action must ensure differences do not compromise vertical separation when aircraft cross the boundary.
Aircraft on tracks diverging by at least 15 degrees with specified distance requirements.
Vertically separate until aircraft have passed each other by at least 10 miles, unless another form of separation established earlier.
Based on the speed of the two aircraft.
Chapter 5 radar identification procedures may be applied where radar coverage is adequate in the transition airspace.
